planMd:
# Plan: Refactor IELTS Journey for Global IELTS Learning

## Summary

Refactor and clean up IELTS Journey to become a global IELTS learning product supporting multiple languages and international users.

## Tasks

1. Inspect Project Structure and User-Facing Features
2. Create Localization System and Language Settings Architecture (depends on: Inspect Project Structure and User-Facing Features)
3. Audit and Remove or Refactor Inappropriate Features (depends on: Create Localization System and Language Settings Architecture)
4. Remove Stale and Unused Code Across the Project (depends on: Audit and Remove or Refactor Inappropriate Features)
5. Update AI Tutor Prompts and Logic for Global User Adaptation (depends on: Remove Stale and Unused Code Across the Project)
6. Refactor User Profile and Settings for Global IELTS Learners (depends on: Update AI Tutor Prompts and Logic for Global User Adaptation)
7. Review and Clean Up Learning Content and Exercises for International Suitability (depends on: Refactor User Profile and Settings for Global IELTS Learners)
8. Audit and Clean Up Chrome Extension Features for Global IELTS Learners (depends on: Review and Clean Up Learning Content and Exercises for International Suitability)
9. Test Main User Flows for Global IELTS Journey (depends on: Audit and Clean Up Chrome Extension Features for Global IELTS Learners)
10. Provide Final Cleanup and Refactor Report (depends on: Test Main User Flows for Global IELTS Journey)
